title: Grapey Silky Garlic Japanese Stir-fry
description: A gluten-free-friendly post-workout dish featuring grape juice, garlic, and a silky texture for added nutrition.

ingredients.name: soy sauce
ingredients.notes: regular or low sodium soy sauce

ingredients.name: rice vinegar
ingredients.notes: use white rice vinegar for best results

instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic and sliced ginger, sauté until fragrant.
Add grape juice, soy sauce, mirin, and rice vinegar to the pan. Stir well and bring to a simmer.
Once the mixture starts to thicken slightly, add scallions and sesame seeds. Mix thoroughly to combine.
Reduce heat to low and let cook for another minute or two until everything is evenly coated and flavors are combined.
Remove from heat immediately after adding sesame seeds and scallions to maintain a silky texture.
